tasks.label: Setup Environment
tasks.detail: Runs the setup script to install dependencies and configure the development environment. Uses setup.bat on Windows and setup.sh on macOS/Linux.

tasks.label: Build and Run Engine (Debug)
tasks.detail: Builds and runs the TwoDEngine in debug mode in a single step.

tasks.label: Build and Run Engine (Release)
tasks.detail: Builds and runs the TwoDEngine in release mode in a single step.

tasks.label: Pack Engine (Debug)
tasks.detail: Packages the TwoDEngine as a standalone distribution in debug mode with debugging symbols. Creates a self-contained package with the executable, DLLs, and assets in a 'dist-debug' directory.

tasks.label: Pack Engine (Release)
tasks.detail: Packages the TwoDEngine as an optimized standalone distribution for release. Creates a self-contained package with the executable, DLLs, and assets in a 'dist' directory.
